message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"17","subject":"Expand workflow system to support 6 labs","description":"Currently WorkflowService only supports 2 labs (DISCOVERY, STRUCTURATION). Expand to support all 6 lab types from analysis recommendations.

**Lab Types to Add:**
- MARKET (market analysis)
- STRATEGY (strategic planning)
- TECH (technical architecture)
- BUSINESS (business model)
- FOUNDER (founder fit assessment)

**Action:**
1. Update workflow_state lab enum to include all 6 types
2. Create lab definitions for each new lab type
3. Update `advanceStep()` to handle all labs
4. Map labs to appropriate project phases:
   - DISCOVERY/MARKET → VALIDATION
   - STRATEGY/TECH → VALIDATION
   - BUSINESS/FOUNDER → EXECUTION
5. Update gate checks to use lab_orientation from analysis_data
6. Test workflow progression through multiple labs

**Goal:** Full 6-lab workflow system ready for future lab implementations.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-10T18:13:24.555Z"}
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Starting Task #17 now!

**Implementation plan:**
1. Update WorkflowState type to support all 6 lab types
2. Create lab definitions for MARKET, STRATEGY, TECH, BUSINESS, FOUNDER
3. Update `advanceStep()` with new phase mappings
4. Enhance gate checks to use lab_orientation from analysis_data
5. Update API to support all lab types
6. Test progression

**Phase mapping strategy:**
- DISCOVERY/MARKET → VALIDATION (research/discovery phase)
- STRATEGY/TECH → VALIDATION (planning phase)  
- BUSINESS/FOUNDER → EXECUTION (implementation phase)

Starting with the lab definitions and type updates. Will report back with progress!

Starting Task #17 now!

**Implementation plan:**
1. Update WorkflowState type to support all 6 lab types
2. Create lab definitions for MARKET, STRATEGY, TECH, BUSINESS, FOUNDER
3. Update `advanceStep()` with new phase mappings
4. Enhance gate checks to use lab_orientation from analysis_data
5. Update API to support all lab types
6. Test progression

**Phase mapping strategy:**
- DISCOVERY/MARKET → VALIDATION (research/discovery phase)
- STRATEGY/TECH → VALIDATION (planning phase)  
- BUSINESS/FOUNDER → EXECUTION (implementation phase)

Starting with the lab definitions and type updates. Will report back with progress!

content.text: Now let me start implementing Task #17. First, I'll update the lab definitions to add the 4 new labs.

content.content:
1→
     2→// src/lib/workflow/definitions.ts
     3→
     4→export interface LabStep {
     5→    id: string
     6→    title: string
     7→    description: string
     8→    expertId?: string // 'marcus', 'sarah', etc.
     9→    type: 'EXPERT_SESSION' | 'GATE_CHECK' | 'SYNTHESIS'
    10→}
    11→
    12→export interface LabDefinition {
    13→    id: string
    14→    name: string
    15→    minScore: number
    16→    steps: LabStep[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const LAB_1_DISCOVERY: LabDefinition = {
    20→    id: 'lab_1',
    21→    name: 'Laboratoire 1 - Discovery',
    22→    minScore: 0,
    23→    steps: [
    24→        {
    25→            id: 'step_1_problem',
    26→            title: 'Problem Deep Dive',
    27→            description: 'Analyse approfondie du problème et identification de la cause racine.',
    28→            expertId: 'marcus',
    29→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    30→        },
    31→        {
    32→            id: 'step_2_market',
    33→            title: 'Market Validation',
    34→            description: 'Validation de la taille du marché et analyse concurrentielle.',
    35→            expertId: 'sarah',
    36→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    37→        },
    38→        {
    39→            id: 'step_3_customer',
    40→            title: 'Customer Profiling',
    41→            description: 'Définition du profil client idéal (ICP) et des segments.',
    42→            expertId: 'elena',
    43→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    44→        },
    45→        {
    46→            id: 'step_4_gate',
    47→            title: 'Pre-Gate Check',
    48→            description: 'Vérification de la maturité du projet pour le passage au Lab 2.',
    49→            type: 'GATE_CHECK'
    50→        },
    51→        {
    52→            id: 'step_5_synthesis',
    53→            title: 'Synthèse & Transition',
    54→            description: 'Synthèse des apprentissages et décision Go/No-Go.',
    55→            type: 'SYNTHESIS'
    56→        }
    57→    ]
    58→}
    59→
    60→export const LAB_2_STRUCTURATION: LabDefinition = {
    61→    id: 'lab_2',
    62→    name: 'Laboratoire 2 - Structuration',
    63→    minScore: 50, // Gate condition
    64→    steps: [
    65→        {
    66→            id: 'step_1_mvp',
    67→            title: 'MVP Definition',
    68→            description: 'Définition du périmètre fonctionnel du Minimum Viable Product.',
    69→            expertId: 'david',
    70→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    71→        },
    72→        {
    73→            id: 'step_2_business',
    74→            title: 'Business Model',
    75→            description: 'Construction du modèle économique et des flux de revenus.',
    76→            expertId: 'sophie',
    77→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    78→        },
    79→        {
    80→            id: 'step_3_finance',
    81→            title: 'Financial Planning',
    82→            description: 'Prévisions financières, budget et runway.',
    83→            expertId: 'thomas',
    84→            type: 'EXPERT_SESSION'
    85→        },
    86→        {
    87→            id: 'step_4_gate',
    88→            title: 'Pre-Launch Check',
    89→            description: 'Vérification finale avant lancement.',
    90→            type: 'GATE_CHECK'
    91→        },
    92→        {
    93→            id: 'step_5_synthesis',
    94→            title: 'Synthèse & Next Steps',
    95→            description: 'Plan d\'action pour la phase suivante.',
    96→            type: 'SYNTHESIS'
    97→        }
    98→    ]
    99→}
   100→
   101→export function getLabDefinition(labNumber: number): LabDefinition {
   102→    return labNumber === 1 ? LAB_1_DISCOVERY : LAB_2_STRUCTURATION
   103→}
   104→
